name: Rhubard Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the brown sugar and shortening until smooth.
2. Add the egg, then stir in vanilla extract.
3. Gradually add sour milk or buttermilk to the sugar mixture, alternating with a mix of sifted flour, baking powder, and baking soda.
4. Fold in chopped rhubarb.
5. Grease an 8-inch cake pan with shortening and sprinkle with brown sugar.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and spread evenly.
7. Sprinkle half a cup of brown sugar on top and add chopped nuts for garnish.
8. Bake at 350°F for 30 to 35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Serve with whipped cream if desired.
